$comment: Permission profile for UNATTENDED bav runs only — passed via `claude -p --settings automation/headless_settings.json`. Deliberately NOT the project settings: interactive sessions keep their normal prompts. TRUST MODEL (be honest): Bash(python3) makes the deny rules guardrails against the model's own habits, not a security boundary — a determined process could bypass them. The real protections are: the model only sees vault data, git history is append-only and pushed (tamper-evident), and the runner owns push. WebFetch is unrestricted because bav-news must trace claims to arbitrary primary sources.
